question.content: From the phase diagram and cooling-curve information in the figure, determine which numbered cooling curve corresponds to point P. Output exactly one token in the format number-P, plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no unit text, no sentence, no equality sign, no chained equalities, and no extra text. Answer format: one final result only. If the result naturally simplifies to a single value, give that value; otherwise give a single algebraic expression using the symbols defined in the problem. Do not include units, explanatory text, or an equals sign.
